summary: Fair‑quality source but a weak performance; only the Foolish Heart jam stands out.
review: Both reviewers found the show to be one of the weaker sets of the tour, describing the playing as sloppy and uninspired. The second set does offer a couple of decent jams – notably the Foolish Heart improvisation and the SOTM outro – but overall nothing extraordinary. No comments were made about the recording itself, so its technical quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews gave 2‑star ratings and criticized the performance; with no recording details the rating is driven mainly by the poor show assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention any aspects of sound quality, clarity, or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set contains a few nice jams but the overall concert is considered mediocre and uninspired.
